ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully handling a pill, emphasizing precision and care.  The movement starts with both arms at rest, then one arm reaches out to receive the pill, holds it gently, and then places it somewhere (perhaps a container). The other arm remains relatively still, providing contrast and balance. The animation is designed to convey a sense of responsibility and cautious handling, fitting with the delicate nature of medication represented by the pill emoji. Frame 1: Both arms are at rest. Frame 2: The right arm extends forward and gently curves downward, as if receiving a pill. Frame 3: The right arm is slightly bent and the wrist turns to show the pill being held carefully. Frame 4: The right arm moves toward a location to place the pill (perhaps a container). Frame 5: Both arms return to their resting positions.

frames.beat: both arms rest, calm and still
the right arm reaches out, ready to catch
the hand cradles the pill with delicate care
the right arm moves to place the pill gently
both arms return to a neutral, resting pose
